prediction.reasoning: Based on typical daily volatility patterns for technology stocks like Micron (MU), I estimated a daily standard deviation of approximately 3-4%. The point estimate assumes slight mean reversion pressure given the high absolute price level. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming roughly normal distribution of daily returns with wider ranges reflecting the inherent uncertainty in short-term stock price movements.
